body:
## Rationale

The `/tools/compare/<slug>` surface currently has 25 existing pairs + 8 in ai-fix (#1795) + 5 in seo-proposal (#1815) = 38 pairs total. These 4 new pairs are confirmed absent from all existing data and proposals.

**Why these pairs score well:**
- All pair roster members (confirmed via drummerComparisons.js + whats-in-kit articles)
- All target high-intent queries: fans debate these specific matchups in forums
- Genre crossover pairs attract readers from multiple fanbases

**The 4 pairs:**

### 1. `nicko-mcbrain-vs-mikkey-dee`
Classic NWOBHM legends: Iron Maiden vs Motörhead — two of the most celebrated British heavy metal drummers. Nicko's technical complexity vs Mikkey's raw power. High search volume from classic metal fans.
Query target: "nicko mcbrain vs mikkey dee drums", "iron maiden vs motorhead drummer"

### 2. `john-otto-vs-ray-luzier`
Nu-metal era legends: Limp Bizkit vs Korn — both massive mainstream acts. Groovy rock-influenced double bass style from John Otto vs Ray's modern technical approach. Nu-metal revival TAM is significant.
Query target: "john otto vs ray luzier", "limp bizkit vs korn drummer"

### 3. `dirk-verbeuren-vs-chris-adler`
Modern thrash era rivals: Megadeth vs Lamb of God — both bands had Grammy-nominated albums in the 2010s. Dirk's European technical precision vs Chris's southern groove-infused thrash. High engagement among modern metal fans.
Query target: "dirk verbeuren vs chris adler", "megadeth vs lamb of god drummer"

### 4. `mike-portnoy-vs-gavin-harrison`
Progressive rock/metal legends: Dream Theater vs Porcupine Tree — the most common "who's the better prog drummer?" debate. Mike's power + Gavin's finesse. Strong prog metal crossover audience.
Query target: "mike portnoy vs gavin harrison", "best progressive metal drummer"

## Implementation

**File:** `packages/frontend/data/drummerComparisons.js`

Add 4 new entries to the `DRUMMER_COMPARISONS` array:

```js
{
  slug: 'nicko-mcbrain-vs-mikkey-dee',
  drummer1: 'nicko-mcbrain',
  drummer2: 'mikkey-dee',
  // title, description, comparison points array
},
{
  slug: 'john-otto-vs-ray-luzier',
  drummer1: 'john-otto',
  drummer2: 'ray-luzier',
},
{
  slug: 'dirk-verbeuren-vs-chris-adler',
  drummer1: 'dirk-verbeuren',
  drummer2: 'chris-adler',
},
{
  slug: 'mike-portnoy-vs-gavin-harrison',
  drummer1: 'mike-portnoy',
  drummer2: 'gavin-harrison',
},
```

**LLM companion files (4 new files):**
- `public/llms/vs/nicko-mcbrain-vs-mikkey-dee.md`
- `public/llms/vs/john-otto-vs-ray-luzier.md`
- `public/llms/vs/dirk-verbeuren-vs-chris-adler.md`
- `public/llms/vs/mike-portnoy-vs-gavin-harrison.md`

Each LLM file: ≥200 words, structured as "Drummer A profile | Drummer B profile | Key differences | Verdict"

## Quality gate (per pair page)
- Title: "[Name A] vs [Name B]: Comparing Two [Genre] Icons"
- ≥300 words of comparison content
- ≥3 FAQ Q&A pairs (AI Overview eligibility)
- ≥3 internal links (profiles of both drummers + related comparison)
- BreadcrumbList + FAQPage JSON-LD (per existing `/tools/compare/<slug>` schema pattern)
- LLM companion file created for each pair

## Expected organic uplift
- 4 new pages covering high-intent "X vs Y drummer" queries
- Internal PageRank flow: each pair page links to 2 drummer profiles
- AI citation surface: 4 new LLM files for comparison queries
- Addresses "who is the better drummer" query bucket (currently zero MetalForge content for these specific pairs)

## Verify
1. `grep 'nicko-mcbrain-vs-mikkey-dee' packages/frontend/data/drummerComparisons.js` — entry present for all 4
2. `/tools/compare/nicko-mcbrain-vs-mikkey-dee` renders with gear comparison table + FAQ
3. All 4 LLM companion files exist in `public/llms/vs/`
4. Sitemap includes new comparison URLs (check api/sitemap.js dynamic loop covers drummerComparisons array)
5. FAQ section renders on each page

## Done
[ ] 4 entries added to drummerComparisons.js
[ ] 4 LLM companion files created in public/llms/vs/
[ ] Sitemap confirmed dynamic (no manual entry needed if array-driven)
title: SEO batch: New drummer comparison pairs (~4 pairs) — nicko-vs-mikkey, john-otto-vs-ray-luzier, dirk-vs-chris-adler, portnoy-vs-gavin
